# web-gui-mcp

Local stdio MCP server for rendering compact `ArtifactSpec` JSON into safe,
deterministic HTML artifacts.

Use this when an agent needs a rich UI surface instead of plain text: comparisons,
reviews, implementation handoffs, diagrams, reports, slide decks, prototype flows,
triage boards, feature flag editors, and prompt tuners.

Primary agent guide:

- `README.agent.md`

Human overview:

- `README.md`

Important commands:

```bash
cd /Users/hzuo/src/web-gui-mcp
python3.11 -m venv .venv
.venv/bin/python -m pip install -e ".[dev]"
.venv/bin/python -m pytest
.venv/bin/ruff check .
.venv/bin/python scripts/render_gallery.py
```

MCP command:

```text
/Users/hzuo/src/web-gui-mcp/.venv/bin/web-gui-mcp
```

Agent rule: do not write arbitrary HTML, CSS, or JavaScript into artifact specs. Use
the supported declarative schema, call `lint_artifact`, then call `render_artifact`.
Prefer `resource_only` or `mcp_app` delivery for large artifacts.
